center.name: 伊貝拉濕地
center.summary: 伊貝拉濕地是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联2种鸟类，包括Strange-tailed tyrant、Ibera seedeater，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in the Iberá Wetlands

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The strange-tailed tyrant (Alectrurus risora) is a Vulnerable species of bird in the family Tyrannidae, the tyrant flycatchers. It is found in Argentina and Paraguay and as a vagrant in Brazil and Uruguay.Remsen, J
